# Provenance And License Check

- [ ] This PR does not copy, adapt, or derive from leaked/proprietary source.
- [ ] New third-party code or assets are attributed and license-compatible.
- [ ] Upstream upstream attribution remains intact where relevant.

# Security Check

- [ ] No secrets, provider keys, private prompts, or private repository code are included.
- [ ] Logs, receipts, and screenshots are redacted where needed.
- [ ] Tool, file, network, or credential behavior is described if changed.
